name: LedgerBrain
title: LedgerCore / LedgerBrain — x402 pay-per-use KYA, KYT, and KYE compliance API for AI agents
description: Run crypto address risk reports, transaction risk screening, entity due diligence, compliance risk screening, and auditable compliance reports via x402 payments. No LedgerBrain API key required for x402 endpoints.

payment.auth_requirement: No LedgerBrain API key required for x402 endpoints. Access is gated by x402 USDC payment on Base mainnet.

capabilities: KYA address risk reports before sending funds to a receiving address
KYT transaction risk reports when receiving or reviewing a crypto payment
KYE entity intelligence reports for counterparty due diligence context
safety_note: LedgerBrain reports provide compliance intelligence and risk context. They are not legal advice, financial advice, or a replacement for regulated compliance judgment.
tags: no LedgerBrain API key required for x402 endpoints
